name: Soup Noodles with Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Cut the hard tips off the soaked lily flowers and cut them in half.
2. Wash the noodles and boil until tender (about 2 minutes). Drain and place in bowls.
3. Heating Broth: Heat the broth in a saucepan with salt and sugar. Add vinegar just before adding to the bowls.
4. Stir-fry: Add oil to a hot wok. When it begins to smoke, add onions and stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add vegetables; stir-fry for 1 minute. Place on noodles and top with chicken. Add soup and serve.
